requirement_topic.en: Electrical and Mechanical Safety under PNS/IEC 60034
requirement_topic.zh: PNS/IEC 60034 下的电气与机械安全
requirement_topic.zht: PNS/IEC 60034 下的電氣與機械安全

summary.en: Industrial motors for the Philippines should meet applicable PNS/IEC 60034 requirements for rating, marking, temperature rise, insulation, duty, protection, and performance. Covered electrical products may also need BPS/DTI certification evidence before sale.
summary.zh: 用于菲律宾的工业电动机应满足适用 PNS/IEC 60034 对额定值、标识、温升、绝缘、工作制、防护和性能的要求。覆盖范围内的电气产品在销售前也可能需要 BPS/DTI 认证证据。
summary.zht: 用於菲律賓的工業電動機應符合適用 PNS/IEC 60034 對額定值、標識、溫升、絕緣、工作制、防護和性能的要求。覆蓋範圍內的電氣產品在銷售前也可能需要 BPS/DTI 認證證據。

standards_or_laws: BPS mandatory product certification where applicable
DTI product safety and market surveillance rules

summary.en: China motor safety and performance files commonly include GB 18613 efficiency evidence, GB 12665 cooling requirements, factory routine tests, and CCC certificates for low-voltage motors in CCC scope. These do not automatically demonstrate PNS/IEC 60034 conformity for the Philippines variant.
summary.zh: 中国电机安全和性能文件通常包括 GB 18613 能效依据、GB 12665 冷却要求、工厂例行测试，以及 CCC 范围内低压电机的 CCC 证书。这些并不会自动证明菲律宾变体符合 PNS/IEC 60034。
summary.zht: 中國電機安全和性能文件通常包括 GB 18613 能效依據、GB 12665 冷卻要求、工廠例行測試，以及 CCC 範圍內低壓電機的 CCC 證書。這些並不會自動證明菲律賓變體符合 PNS/IEC 60034。

standards_or_laws: CCC catalogue requirements for motors under 1 kV where applicable

gap.en: The Philippines safety file must reflect the actual 60 Hz product. Temperature rise, insulation stress, fan cooling, speed, bearings, and enclosure performance can differ from a China 50 Hz version.
gap.zh: 菲律宾安全文件必须反映实际 60 Hz 产品。温升、绝缘应力、风扇冷却、转速、轴承和外壳性能都可能不同于中国 50 Hz 版本。
gap.zht: 菲律賓安全文件必須反映實際 60 Hz 產品。溫升、絕緣應力、風扇冷卻、轉速、軸承和外殼性能都可能不同於中國 50 Hz 版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for applicable PNS/IEC 60034 conformity and BPS/DTI covered product controls
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where China standards and CCC scope apply

source.publisher: Bureau of Philippine Standards (BPS), Department of Trade and Industry

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Build the Philippines safety file around the 60 Hz variant and applicable PNS/IEC 60034 clauses; China domestic CCC or GB files are not enough by themselves.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应围绕 60 Hz 变体和适用 PNS/IEC 60034 条款建立菲律宾安全文件；中国国内 CCC 或 GB 文件本身不足够。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應圍繞 60 Hz 變體和適用 PNS/IEC 60034 條款建立菲律賓安全文件；中國國內 CCC 或 GB 文件本身不足夠。

requirement_topic.zh: 铭牌、标识与安装兼容性
requirement_topic.zht: 銘牌、標識與安裝兼容性

summary.en: Philippines-ready industrial motors should clearly mark voltage, frequency, phase, output, duty, speed, insulation class, enclosure or IP rating, efficiency class, and certification or clearance markings where applicable. The marking must support 380/220 V three-phase, 60 Hz use when that is the intended supply.
summary.zh: 适合菲律宾的工业电动机应清楚标明电压、频率、相数、输出功率、工作制、转速、绝缘等级、外壳或 IP 等级、能效等级以及适用的认证或清关标识。当预定电源为 380/220 V 三相、60 Hz 时，标识必须支持该用途。
summary.zht: 適合菲律賓的工業電動機應清楚標明電壓、頻率、相數、輸出功率、工作制、轉速、絕緣等級、外殼或 IP 等級、能效等級以及適用的認證或清關標識。當預定電源為 380/220 V 三相、60 Hz 時，標識必須支持該用途。

standards_or_laws: BPS/DTI certification or ICC marking requirements where applicable
DOE energy-efficiency information requirements for covered motors

summary.en: China-market nameplates commonly show 380 V, 50 Hz, GB standard references, factory serials, and CCC marking where applicable. Export nameplates should not simply reuse China domestic 50 Hz markings when the Philippines product is intended for 60 Hz service.
summary.zh: 中国市场铭牌通常显示 380 V、50 Hz、GB 标准引用、工厂序列号以及适用时的 CCC 标志。当菲律宾产品预定用于 60 Hz 时，出口铭牌不应简单沿用中国国内 50 Hz 标识。
summary.zht: 中國市場銘牌通常顯示 380 V、50 Hz、GB 標準引用、工廠序列號以及適用時的 CCC 標誌。當菲律賓產品預定用於 60 Hz 時，出口銘牌不應簡單沿用中國國內 50 Hz 標識。

standards_or_laws: CCC catalogue requirements for motors under 1 kV where applicable

gap.en: A misleading or incomplete nameplate can create both safety and customs problems. The most important check is that the plate and manual do not present a 50 Hz-only China product as suitable for the Philippines 60 Hz grid.
gap.zh: 误导性或不完整铭牌可能同时造成安全和海关问题。最重要的核查是铭牌和说明书不得将仅适用于中国 50 Hz 的产品表示为适合菲律宾 60 Hz 电网。
gap.zht: 誤導性或不完整銘牌可能同時造成安全和海關問題。最重要的核查是銘牌和說明書不得將僅適用於中國 50 Hz 的產品表示為適合菲律賓 60 Hz 電網。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for PNS/IEC 60034 marking, DOE information, and BPS/DTI clearance where applicable
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China domestic marking; export marking must match the Philippines configuration

source.publisher: Department of Trade and Industry, Republic of the Philippines

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Review the nameplate before shipment. A Philippines motor should state the correct 60 Hz rating and certification or clearance identifiers where required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 出货前应审查铭牌。菲律宾电机应标明正确 60 Hz 额定值及按要求适用的认证或清关识别信息。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 出貨前應審查銘牌。菲律賓電機應標明正確 60 Hz 額定值及按要求適用的認證或清關識別信息。
